//: Cron drains the notifications queue. Vercel hits the path with an Authorization header derived from CRON_SECRET (Vercel's reserved env var). The route also accepts NOTIFICATIONS_WORKER_SECRET — set BOTH to the same value in Vercel for cron + manual triggers to work, or wrap the worker route to accept either.
//headers: Defense-in-depth security headers. The X-Frame-Options + Content-Security-Policy 'frame-ancestors' pair blocks clickjacking. Strict-Transport-Security forces HTTPS for a year (subdomains too). X-Content-Type-Options stops MIME sniffing. Referrer-Policy keeps booking-token URLs out of cross-origin referrer logs (important for /booking/manage/[token]). Permissions-Policy denies sensors we never use.
